title: MCC Island Optimised Assets
description:
Official Assets for the MCC Island Optimised Modpack
Not affiliated with Noxcrew and MCC Island!
This project is only used for my MCC Island Optimised Modpack and is an unofficial MCC island Texturepack! Please download "MCC Island Optimised" instead!
body:
# 👑 MCC Island Optimised Assets 🗂️
Official Assets for the MCC Island Optimised Modpack
### ✨ Features: ## 1. 🏠 Title Screen MCCI Optimised Title Screen with the help of the MCCI Optimised Assets Resourcepack and the Island Menu mod ❌ You can disable this by removing the "Island Menu" and the "ServerMainMenu Lib" mod!
Custom Title Screen
## 2. 💦 Splash Screen MCCI Optimised Splash Screen with the help of the MCCI Optimised Assets Resourcepack and the Puzzle mod ❌ You can disable this by removing the "Puzzle" mod!
Custom Splash Screen
# ⚠️ DISCLAIMER ⚠️ **NONE of the mods listed in the MCC Island Optimised modpack are mine! I'm not affiliated with or supported by Noxcrew/MCC Island or any of these mods and projects! This project is only used for my MCC Island Optimised Modpack and is an unofficial MCC Island Texturepack!**
